query_text: CREATE TABLE system_queries (query_id, query_text, execution_time, timestamp)
CREATE TABLE system_backups (backup_id, provider, timestamp, size, encrypted)
CREATE TABLE system_security (event_id, event_type, description, timestamp, project)
